## Infrastructure Phase

This phase was identified as pure infrastructure — the team balancing algorithm already exists in `src/lib/team-balancer.ts`. The phase focuses on:

1. Database queries and Server Actions for team generation and locking
2. Team reveal UI with @dnd-kit drag-and-drop
3. Balance indicator display

No gray areas required discussion — implementation follows existing patterns and ROADMAP specifications.
